Operation 'updateUser' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks specificity about what user data can be updated, whether partial updates are supported, and what is returned. Added clarity on authorization requirement, partial update support, and return value to improve AI agent interpretability and help agents understand the operation's scope and effects.

data.summary_suggestion: Update user profile and account information
data.description_suggestion: Updates user data including profile information and account settings. Requires ROLE_USER_MANAGEMENT authorization. Accepts partial updates - only provided fields in the request will be modified. Returns the updated user object with all current user properties.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks specificity about what user data can be updated, whether partial updates are supported, and what is returned. Added clarity on authorization requirement, partial update support, and return value to improve AI agent interpretability and help agents understand the operation's scope and effects.

message: Operation 'assignRole' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks detail about what happens as a result of the assignment (permission changes), what is returned, and the side effects on user access. Enhanced description clarifies the authorization requirement, return value, and the impact on user permissions to help AI agents understand the operation's consequences.

data.current_description: Assign a role to a user. Requires ROLE_ROLE_MANAGEMENT.
data.description_suggestion: Assigns a role to a user, granting the associated permissions. Requires ROLE_ROLE_MANAGEMENT authorization. Returns confirmation of the role assignment. This operation modifies the user's access permissions and role-based capabilities.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks detail about what happens as a result of the assignment (permission changes), what is returned, and the side effects on user access. Enhanced description clarifies the authorization requirement, return value, and the impact on user permissions to help AI agents understand the operation's consequences.

message: Operation 'removeRole' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks specificity about required parameters (user ID, role ID), what is returned, and the side effects of role removal on user permissions. Enhanced description clarifies the parameters needed, authorization requirement, return value, and the impact on user access to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Remove a role from a user. Requires ROLE_ROLE_MANAGEMENT.
data.description_suggestion: Removes a role from a user, revoking the associated permissions. Requires ROLE_ROLE_MANAGEMENT authorization. Accepts user ID and role ID as parameters. Returns confirmation of the role removal. This operation modifies the user's access permissions and may restrict previously granted capabilities.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks specificity about required parameters (user ID, role ID), what is returned, and the side effects of role removal on user permissions. Enhanced description clarifies the parameters needed, authorization requirement, return value, and the impact on user access to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'refreshToken' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks details about what inputs are required (valid refresh token), what is returned (new JWT token with expiration), and whether the refresh token is reusable. Enhanced description provides these details for better AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Use a refresh token to obtain a new JWT auth token.
data.description_suggestion: Use a refresh token to obtain a new JWT auth token. Requires a valid refresh token from a prior login. Returns a new JWT auth token with a one-hour expiration. The refresh token itself remains valid for subsequent refresh operations.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks details about what inputs are required (valid refresh token), what is returned (new JWT token with expiration), and whether the refresh token is reusable. Enhanced description provides these details for better AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve a list of bank accounts for the authenticated user.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of bank accounts for the authenticated user. Supports filtering and sorting via query parameters. data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is minimal. Missing details about pagination support (indicated by 3 parameters), filtering/sorting capabilities, response structure (AccountListResponse), and specific account fields returned. Description lacks specificity about what account details are returned and access control context. Enhanced description specifies the Account schema fields and clarifies that the account must belong to the authenticated user, improving AI agent understanding of authorization requirements.

data.current_description: Retrieve details of a specific bank account.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve detailed information for a specific bank account by its ID. Returns an Account object containing account ID, type, balance, status, and other account details. Requires bearer token authentication and the account must belong to the authenticated user.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks specificity about what account details are returned and access control context. Enhanced description specifies the Account schema fields and clarifies that the account must belong to the authenticated user, improving AI agent understanding of authorization requirements.

message: Operation 'deleteAccount' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear but description is too minimal. Missing critical information about side effects (permanent deletion, cannot be undone), response format (204 No Content), and access control (account must belong to authenticated user). data.current_description: Delete a bank account by ID.
data.description_suggestion: Delete a bank account by its ID. This operation permanently removes the account from the system. Requires bearer token authentication and the account must belong to the authenticated user. Returns a success response with no body content (204 No Content). This action cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is too minimal. Missing critical information about side effects (permanent deletion, cannot be undone), response format (204 No Content), and access control (account must belong to authenticated user).
